== Notes for [[Item:Q87562|Q87562]] ==

Quintus Fabius Maximus Aemilianus
* MyHeritage Family Trees
* Best, managed by Clemens Best (Contact)
* Birth: Circa Jan 1 190
* Death: Circa Jan 1 130
* Parents: Lucius Aemilius Paullus Macedonicus, Papiria Macedonicus
* Siblings: Aemilia Licianus (geb. Tertia), Publius Cornelius Scipio Aemilianus Africanus Numantinus
* Son: Quintus Fabius Maximus Allobrogicus

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
